name: SCP-████
description:
SCP-XXXXX is a small, seemingly innocuous object resembling an ornate, rectangular mirror measuring 30 cm by 50 cm. Its surface is polished to an almost unnatural sheen, reflecting light in such a way that it appears to distort the environment around it. SCP-XXXXX's frame is made of an unidentified metal, which has proven impervious to standard methods of analysis. Initial scans revealed no significant anomalies in its structure, though traces of a rare, untraceable material have been detected embedded within the mirror's frame.

SCP-XXXXX exhibits anomalous properties when any living organism comes within a 3-meter radius of its reflective surface. Once this proximity is reached, the reflective surface begins to "absorb" light and sound from the surrounding environment, creating a visual distortion that affects both the appearance of the mirror itself and the space around it.

When a subject gazes into SCP-XXXXX or comes into direct contact with its surface, the following sequence of events occurs:

  1. Perceptual Shift: The subject's perception of reality begins to distort, often experiencing intense visual and auditory hallucinations. The subject may report seeing alternate versions of themselves, or different environments entirely. These altered realities appear to be linked to the subject’s subconscious desires, fears, or memories, though they seem to be constructed from elements of the environment and the subject’s past.

  2. Temporal Anomaly: Time within the reflection appears to pass differently from the real world. The subject may experience days or even years within the reflected space, while only moments pass in the actual world. These experiences are extremely disorienting and can result in severe psychological trauma, as subjects lose their sense of time and reality.

  3. Entity Manifestation: In some cases, an anomalous entity, referred to as SCP-XXXXX-A, has been observed to manifest within the reflection. SCP-XXXXX-A appears as a humanoid figure dressed in a tattered, indistinct uniform, though its features are obscured. The figure seems to communicate with the subject through gestures or non-verbal means, though any attempts to understand or communicate with it have proven unsuccessful.

  4. Psychological and Physical Effects: Extended exposure to SCP-XXXXX can lead to irreversible psychological damage. Subjects who interact with the mirror for prolonged periods often exhibit severe cognitive dissonance, with some developing dissociative disorders or a complete detachment from reality. In extreme cases, subjects have attempted to physically enter the mirror or have died under unexplained circumstances after prolonged exposure.

Additional Notes:
SCP-XXXXX's origin remains unknown. It was discovered in an abandoned mansion in [REDACTED], where it was reportedly used in an occult ritual. No further information about the ritual has been uncovered, but it is believed to have been an attempt to create a portal to an alternate dimension or parallel reality.

The anomalous effects of SCP-XXXXX suggest that it might not be a simple mirror, but rather an object capable of distorting the boundaries between dimensions, reality, and perception. Further research into the mirror’s origins, as well as the nature of SCP-XXXXX-A, is ongoing. The mirror continues to be one of the most dangerous objects in containment, with the potential to destabilize both individual minds and reality itself.
creator: Foundationn
